title: Silver.
description: A mod that adds quite a few items and blocks to enhance your Minecraft world.
body: From the sun-striked desert, to the shiver-swept taiga, this mod adds thing that improe almost every bit of Minecraft in one way or another. Enjoy countless new blocks, decorations, structures, music discs, and items in Silver. We have ores at the bottom of the world, or we have floating and floral paper lanterns! Whatever you desire, wo most likely have it here. Download Silver today!
